cmoncol:rancher.job.desc: The Rancher harvests passive resources like Wool and Milk from Cobblemon stored in the Pasture.
cmoncol:attendant.job.desc: The Attendant trains and breeds Cobblemon in the Daycare in exchange for currency.
cmoncol:ev_trainer.job.desc: The EV Trainer targets specific stats and hyper-trains Cobblemon in the Trainer Academy.
cmoncol:harvester.job.desc: The Harvester harvests fully grown Apricorn trees around their plantation without destroying the crop.
cmoncol:pokeball_workshop.job.desc: The Ball Crafter turns apricorns and materials into Capture Balls. Learns better recipes as the building levels up.
cmoncol:science_lab.job.desc: The Scientist processes Sand and Gravel to find Fossils and rare loot.
cmoncol:nurse.job.desc: The Nurse heals nearby players and their Cobblemon, and calls upon a companion to assist them.
cmoncol:pokemon_guard.job.desc: The Cobblemon Guard patrols the colony alongside their trusty companion to fend off monster raids.
cmoncol:gym.job.desc: The Arena Master waits for challengers. Defeat them to earn a prestigious Arena Crest!
cmoncol:wonder_trader.job.desc: The Miracle Trader takes your deposited Cobblemon and exchanges it for a completely random one from across the globe.
cmoncol:pokemerchant.job.desc: The Trainer Mart Cashier sells essential items like Capture Balls and Potions. Their inventory expands as the building levels up.
cmoncol:ranger.job.desc: The Ranger will travel around your colony making sure all the Cobblemon are safe. Whilst wandering round they may find abandoned Eggs and if you're a good trainer present you with one. The Eggs they find can have better stats and rare species as the building levels up.
cmoncol:rancher.skills.desc: Benefits from high Stamina and Agility to harvest resources faster.
cmoncol:attendant.skills.desc: Benefits from high Mana and Knowledge to grant more XP per training cycle.
cmoncol:ev_trainer.skills.desc: Benefits from high Athletics and Strength to EV train faster.
cmoncol:harvester.skills.desc: Benefits from high Agility and Stamina to harvest faster.
cmoncol:pokeball_workshop.skills.desc: Benefits from high Dexterity and Agility to craft faster.
cmoncol:science_lab.skills.desc: Benefits from high Intelligence and Knowledge to process materials faster.
cmoncol:nurse.skills.desc: Benefits from high Intelligence and Adaptability to manage the Recovery Center efficiently.
cmoncol:pokemon_guard.skills.desc: Benefits from high Athletics and Strength to better defend the town.
cmoncol:gym.skills.desc: Benefits from high Knowledge and Mana to strategize and battle effectively.
cmoncol:wonder_trader.skills.desc: Benefits from high Mana and Knowledge to process Miracle Trades more efficiently.
cmoncol:pokemerchant.skills.desc: Benefits from high Adaptability and Intelligence to manage shop inventory and customer satisfaction.
cmoncol:ranger.skills.desc: Benefits from high Agility and Athletics to navigate around your Colony and avoid dangerous Cobblemon.
